## Anti-Pattern Name
<!-- A short, memorable name for this failure mode -->

## What Happened
<!-- Describe the observable behavior -->

## Cost
<!-- How much time/money/effort was wasted? -->

## Root Cause
<!-- Why did it happen? What was the underlying issue? -->

## Fix
<!-- How did you solve it? -->

## Prevention
<!-- How can this be detected/prevented early? -->

## Context
<!-- What kind of agent system? What LLM? Production or testing? -->
